note: sum_models (SPEC sum_models, SM-07): two float-only (no cat features -> ctr_data-free) oblivious RMSE regressors sharing IDENTICAL float_feature_borders and bias (SM-04's first-slice merge precondition) but DIFFERENT leaf values (different learning_rate at depth=1/iterations=1 -- see gen_fixtures.py module docstring for why deeper/more-iterations configurations reliably diverge in which borders get baked into the model). expected_m0/expected_m1 isolate apply from merge arithmetic; expected_w_1_1/expected_w_03_07 are catboost.sum_models(...).predict(...) ground truth. Every .predict(...) call pins prediction_type='RawFormulaVal' explicitly.
